controlSet.description: Require all commitment, authority, terms, constraint, revocation, attestation, and contestability fields.
Bind the commitment to execution evidence and the evaluated policy version.
Capture counterparty reliance and intended operational effect.
Record the dispute, reconciliation, or remediation endpoint.

rules: Require all commitment, authority, terms, constraint, revocation, attestation, and contestability fields.
Bind the commitment to execution evidence and the evaluated policy version.
Capture counterparty reliance and intended operational effect.
Record the dispute, reconciliation, or remediation endpoint.

threats.description: Commitment exists without durable proof of authority and evaluated constraints.
Terms are human-readable but not machine-checkable.
Affected parties cannot resolve conflict or breach.

transitions.trigger: supersession or replacement by stronger artifact

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as a legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
